tool.name: gmail_bulk_send_email
tool.description: Send multiple emails via Gmail in sequence using separate browser tabs. Each email is composed and sent independently. Pass all emails as a JSON array string. Use this instead of calling gmail_send_email multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. You must be logged in to Gmail.

parameters.name: emails
parameters.description: JSON array string of emails to send. Each object must have 'to', 'subject', and 'body' fields. Example: [{"to":"a@b.com","subject":"Hi","body":"Hello"}]
